# CodeScanResult

> Results from scanning a codebase for LLM/AI usage patterns

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| projectPath | string | yes | - | Scanned project path |

| totalLlmCalls | integer | yes | - | Number of LLM call sites found |

| callSites | json | yes | - | Array of {file, line, provider, model, estimatedCost} |
| recommendations | json | yes | - | Optimization recommendations |
| riskScore | float | yes | - | Overall AI risk score (0-1) |
| scanDuration | integer | yes | - | Scan time in milliseconds |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
